prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: orb icon sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create an opaque chroma-key source sprite sheet for six match-3 orb icons.
Subject: six circular orb icons in a 3x2 sheet: fire, ice, earth, heart, armor, gold.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy game icons, crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: equal-size icons centered in cells, balanced padding, no clipping.
Color palette: fire ruby/orange, ice blue, earth green, heart rose, armor silver, gold yellow.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid magenta key background #FF00FF only.
Constraints: exact one-color background #FF00FF; no checkerboard; no gradient; no texture; no vignette; no shadows touching background; no glow touching background; no particles touching background; no frame/panel/matte backdrop unless it is a real orb component; no labels; no text; no logo; no watermark.
Avoid: do not use #FF00FF or near-magenta key tones inside the orb artwork.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
